Name: SurprisedGalaxy
Notes: A portal that warps the player to a specific galaxy. It has a far clipping radius of 200 meters. The galaxy to warp to is specified in the name of the object, unless it is "SurprisedGalaxy", in which case it warps to SurfingLv1Galaxy. If this object is either SurpTamakoroExLv2Galaxy, SurpCubeBubbleExLv2Galaxy or SurpSurfingLv2Galaxy, it will only appear once all three Green Stars have been collected. If this object is SurpPeachCastleFinalGalaxy, it will only appear once the player has collected 121 Stars with both Mario and Luigi.

SW_APPEAR.Description: Appears when this switch is activated.

SW_AWAKE.Description: Enables rendering and resumes updates when this switch is active.

DemoSimpleCast.Description: Continues movement during cutscenes, NPC conversations, etc.
